sigma.title: Payload Decoded and Decrypted via Built-in Utilities
Suspicious Execution via macOS Script Editor
Suspicious Deno File Written from Remote Source
Suspicious Binaries and Scripts in Public Folder
Arbitrary Shell Command Execution Via Settingcontent-Ms

osquery.name: t1204_proc_exec
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, parent, name, path, cmdline, cwd, uid, gid, on_disk FROM processes WHERE cmdline != '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1204_proc_events
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, parent, path, cmdline, uid, time FROM process_events ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 2 inherited-from-parent run(s) [no direct sub-technique executions], 7/7 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
promotion.multi_source_upgrade_note: Upgraded from S5-P to S5-C-Docker-H based on real detections from: deception_engine_real_engagement. See sigma_matches.json for corroborating detection records.
promotion.sigma_direct_note: Real Sigma firing confirmed in sigma_evaluation_report.json (Linux osquery or Windows Sysmon GHA telemetry). Cert tier upgraded to direct (-D).

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
